title: Denver Real Estate Platform
description: A modern real estate website built with React where users can browse properties, view featured listings, and explore property details. Content is managed dynamically using a headless CMS.

title: Tecko – IT Solutions & Technology Website
description: A modern IT agency website where users can explore services, projects, and technology solutions. Content is managed dynamically using a headless CMS and delivered through a responsive React-based interface.

title: Creative Interactive Web Experience
description: A fun and interactive web project focused on creative UI elements, playful animations, and engaging user experiences built with modern front-end technologies.

title: Code Academy Final Project
description: a fully responsive e-commerce website built using Shopify, demonstrating modern frontend design, product management, and user experience optimization.
